title: gastrochilus retrocallosus
intro: Gastrochilus retrocallosus, also known as the Himalayan orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gastrochilus retrocallosus are said to include reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold, and treating various respiratory disorders. In traditional medicine, this plant is prepared in various herbal formulations, such as decoctions, infusions, and capsules, to harness its therapeutic properties.
